title: ai — PHP attribute contracts
description: Five owned attributes discovered at boot. AsAiTool + Sensitivity + RequiresRoles are read by PersonaResolver / ToolDiscoveryBootstrapper at boot. NeverAutoWrite + AllowBackgroundWrite are read at every tool-call by ToolAuthorizerDecorator. All five compile-time-attribute driven; no runtime reflection.

attributes.name: AsAiTool
attributes.description: Marks a class as an AI tool discoverable by ToolDiscoveryBootstrapper. The bootstrapper scans every enabled module's `Tools/` namespace for classes carrying this attribute and registers them with ToolRegistry under the supplied name. That string is what personas reference in their `toolNames()` array AND what the LLM sees when deciding which tool to invoke.

params.name: name
params.description: Globally unique tool identifier. Convention: snake_case verbs. `find_athlete`, `get_progress_card`, `draft_match_recap`, `search_drills`. Bootstrapper throws DuplicateToolNameException on collision.

params.name: description
params.description: Optional fallback description shown in the admin inspection endpoint (`GET /admin/ai/tools`) before the tool is instantiated. The tool's own `description()` method is authoritative when present.

attributes.example:
#[AsAiTool(name: 'find_athlete', description: 'Locate an athlete by name, email, or id.')]
final class FindAthleteTool extends SensitiveTool { /* ... */ }

attributes.name: Sensitivity
attributes.description: Per-persona ceiling — declares the strictest sensitivity class the persona may reach. Values from the Sensitivity enum. A `Public` persona MUST NOT bundle a `Medical` tool (enforced at boot). `Safeguarding` is hard-denied by SensitiveDataGate regardless of consent/role.

attributes.name: RequiresRoles
attributes.description: Declares the spatie/permission role(s) required to invoke a persona. Read by AuthorizePersonaRole HTTP middleware BEFORE the request reaches RunPersonaChatController. Caller must hold at least one listed role (OR semantics).

params.name: roles
params.description: Roles from the canonical Tenancy::defaultRoles() catalogue: owner / admin / branch_manager / coach / athlete / parent_guardian / front_desk / viewer / medical (sports only). NO head_coach / hr / finance / staff — those don't exist in the catalogue.

attributes.name: NeverAutoWrite
attributes.description: Persona-level marker (defence-in-depth). When ToolAuthorizerDecorator finds this on the persona currently in scope, every tool call — regardless of the tool's declared WriteMode — routes through the draft-then-confirm flow. Applied on MedicalAssistantPersona + AnomalyDetectorPersona + AthleteAssistantPersona.

attributes.name: AllowBackgroundWrite
attributes.description: Tool-level escape hatch. Marks a WriteMode::Write tool that MAY execute a direct write inside a background persona, bypassing the draft-then-confirm flow. Interactive personas MUST NOT bundle a tool carrying this (verified at boot). Loses to `#[NeverAutoWrite]` on the persona.

discovery.runs_at: boot (via #[AsAiTool] scan through Foundation's DiscoversAttributes contract)
output_registries: ToolRegistry — map of tool name → resolved class + Sensitivity + WriteMode
PersonaResolver internal — map of persona class → {roles[], sensitivity ceiling, neverAutoWrite flag}
discovery.cache: olvlvl/composer-attribute-collector static manifest at vendor/attributes.php. Runtime lookup is O(1).
